overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red coat walking along a coastal trail at night. The character passes a campfire and glowing blue crystals while traversing a path between rocky cliffs and the ocean, transitioning into open grassland.

events.description: warm campfire light becomes visible in the distance ahead
character slows briefly while passing the campfire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path toward a campfire

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the path
dark ocean visible beyond the coastal vegetation
uneven dirt and stone trail winding along the coast
burning campfire with warm orange glow situated on the left side of the path
green grass and bushes lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow coastal trail at night, flanked by a tall rocky cliff on the right and ocean views on the left. The path is lined with grass and bushes as the character approaches a warm campfire burning in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky path with magical blue crystals

events.description: passing the campfire and moving beyond its warm light
glowing blue crystals appear embedded in rocks on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the campfire and alongside glowing blue crystals

entered.detail: large glowing blue crystalline formations embedded in the rocky ground
leafless dead tree trunk on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the campfire, the character moves along the trail where the cliff wall looms closer on the right. Glowing blue magical crystals appear embedded in the rocks beside the path, casting an ethereal light as a dead tree becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grassland with scattered trees

events.description: rocky cliff recedes into the distance as landscape opens up
path becomes surrounded by more open grassland and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland away from the cliffs toward distant terrain

entered.detail: sparse dead and living trees dotting the left side of the landscape
expansive grassy terrain replacing the close cliff walls

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide grassland as the coastal cliffs fade into the distance behind. Scattered trees dot the landscape on the left while the character continues along the dirt path through the open terrain under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow coastal trail at night that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit grassland. It begins with the character walking between a towering rocky cliff and the ocean, moving through grass and bushes toward the warm glow of a distant campfire. As the character passes the fire, the cliff wall looms closer and the lighting shifts to an ethereal blue as glowing magical crystals emerge from the rocks beside a solitary dead tree. The scene then expands as the restrictive cliffs fade into the distance, transitioning the dirt path into an open terrain. Finally, the camera follows the character across the vast grassland, dotted with scattered trees under a clear night sky.
